title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾（🦞）为标志，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: obra/superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，强调其有效性。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用 AI，提供工具以便用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随用户成长而进化的智能代理项目。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种大型语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源的编码代理工具，旨在辅助开发者进行代码生成和自动化任务。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
content: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
summary: 一个基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱观察的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改善Claude Code的行为。
highlights: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior
derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui 是一个基于 Gradio 库的 Stable Diffusion 模型网页界面，提供图像生成、编辑等功能，支持多种模型和扩展。
highlights: 基于 Gradio 的网页界面
支持多种 Stable Diffusion 模型
提供图像生成与编辑功能

title: thunderbolt-ibverbs: We have InfiniBand at home
summary: 文章探讨了通过Thunderbolt接口实现类似InfiniBand的高性能网络连接，即使用消费级硬件模拟InfiniBand的功能。
highlights: thunderbolt-ibverbs: We have InfiniBand at home
通过Thunderbolt接口实现类似InfiniBand的高性能网络连接

title: Constraining LLMs Just Like Users
summary: 文章探讨了如何像约束用户一样约束大型语言模型（LLMs），可能涉及权限、行为限制或安全措施。
highlights: Constraining LLMs Just Like Users
Comments

title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
content: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.
summary: 报告探讨了Codex如何通过AI驱动的研究、数据分析、工作流自动化和内容创作，将知识工作的生产力提升至新高度。
highlights: Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research
data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation

title: Our views on AI policy and political advocacy
content: Our approach to AI policy and political advocacy, transparency, support for thoughtful regulation and AI safety, and that no outside political group speaks on the company’s behalf.
summary: OpenAI 阐述其在AI政策与政治倡导上的立场，强调透明度、支持审慎监管与AI安全，并声明无外部政治团体代表公司发言。
highlights: Our approach to AI policy and political advocacy, transparency
support for thoughtful regulation and AI safety
no outside political group speaks on the company’s behalf

title: Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains
summary: JetBrains 发布了 Mellum2，一个 12B 参数的混合专家模型，旨在提升代码生成和编程辅助任务的性能。
highlights: JetBrains 推出 Mellum2，一个 12B 参数的混合专家模型。
该模型专注于代码生成和编程辅助任务。
Mellum2 采用混合专家架构以提高效率。

title: Beyond LLMs: Why Scalable Enterprise AI Adoption Depends on Agent Logic
summary: 文章探讨了企业大规模采用AI的关键在于代理逻辑（Agent Logic），而非仅仅依赖大型语言模型（LLMs）。它指出，为了实现可扩展的企业AI，需要将LLMs与结构化、可组合的代理逻辑相结合，以处理复杂工作流、确保可靠性和可维护性。文章强调了模块化设计、状态管理和错误处理的重要性，并提供了IBM在构建企业级AI系统时的实践经验。
highlights: Scalable enterprise AI adoption depends on agent logic, not just LLMs.
Agent logic enables structured, composable workflows for complex tasks.
Modular design and state management are critical for reliability and maintainability.
IBM's practical insights on building enterprise-grade AI systems.
